summary: W873 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while composing W856 endpoint-facts reconstruction with the W872 homology-free selected-cochain stable-ExactAt route. From one W856 endpoint-facts provider, W873 checks direct bounded left calculus and obtains the bounded derived infinity-category package through W856, W853, W831, and W869/W870/W872. Product success remains false because the eight endpoint-facts route-data fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W873 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to the W856 endpoint-facts provider surface, but its eight concrete fields are still not instantiated.

Concrete W856 endpoint-facts data is not yet fully instantiated; the latest route boundary is boundary/relation data, target closedness branch, normalized target, source triangulation, endpoint topology facts, and localized right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block the eight concrete W856 endpoint-facts provider fields now isolated by W873.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
